{{Quote|Subaltern Doshao, for his actions at the world called Dantooine. Subaltern Sata'ak, for his actions at the world called Ithor. Subaltern Harmae, for his actions at the world called Obroa-skai. And Subaltern Tugorn, both for his work in sowing the world called Belkadan and his actions at the world called Gyndine. Step forward and be escalated.|The subordinate commander|<ref name="Agents" />}}
'''Doshao''' was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] of the [[warrior caste]] who distinguished himself in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] as a [[subaltern]] during the [[Battle of Dantooine (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Dantooine]] as part of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. For his actions on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]], Doshao was [[Escalation|escalated]] to the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[Sector chief/Legends|sector chief]] aboard the [[Warship/Legends|warship]] ''[[Yammka]]'' while it was in [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]] and was given all of the privileges and responsibilities that rank entitled.

==Biography==
{{Quote|You are escalated and remade. And now that you wear the cloak of command, you will be given your own ships, made sector chiefs, and tasked with overseeing and reeducating the populace of those worlds that constitute your domain.|Warmaster Nas Choka escalates Doshao and the other three subalterns|<ref name="Agents" />}}
[[File:DantooineView.png|thumb|left|230px|As a subaltern, Doshao acted bravely during a battle on Dantooine (pictured).]]
A [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] of the [[warrior caste]], Doshao participated in his [[Species/Legends|species]]' [[Extragalactic/Legends|extra-galactic]] invasion of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], Doshao held the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[subaltern]] and was present on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]],<ref name="Agents" /> where he committed brave deeds<ref name="TCSWE">{{CSWECite|I|202|Doshao, Subaltern}}</ref> during the [[Battle of Dantooine (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Dantooine]]<ref name="Agents" /> between the Yuuzhan Vong and New Republic.<ref name="Dark">''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide I: Onslaught]]''</ref> Later, the subaltern was present aboard the Yuuzhan Vong [[miid ro'ik]] [[Warship/Legends|warship]] ''[[Yammka]]'' while it was near the planet [[Runaway Prince]] in [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]]. On the ''Yammka'', Doshao was assembled along with a multitude of other warriors to greet the arrival of [[Warmaster]] [[Nas Choka]], whose [[Choka's subordinate commander|subordinate commander]] shortly called Doshao to come forward to the dais at the front of the assembly, alongside [[Sata'ak|three]] [[Harmae|other]] [[Tugorn|subalterns]].<ref name="Agents" />

For his actions on Dantooine, Doshao was escalated before the audience alongside the three other subalterns. A modified [[implanter]] proceeded to climb up Doshao's back and slice open his shoulders to insert a hooked horn onto either shoulder. With each subaltern given a [[command cloak]] to hang off their newly added spikes, Choka personally promoted Doshao and the others to the rank of [[Sector chief/Legends|sector chief]], granted them each their own [[Starship/Legends|starship]], and finally tasked them with overseeing and managing the populations that made up their new domains.<ref name="Agents" />

==Personality and traits==
During Doshao's [[Time/Legends|time]] on Dantooine, he committed actions considered brave by his fellows,<ref name="TCSWE" /> which led to his escalation. Although he sweated and trembled during the painful implanting process of his escalation ceremony, Doshao did not cry out in pain, much to the satisfaction of Warmaster Nas Choka.<ref name="Agents" />

==Behind the scenes==
Doshao first appeared in [[James Luceno]]'s [[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse|''Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse'']], a [[2000]] installment of [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''The New Jedi Order'']] series.<ref name="Agents" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'' {{1st}}
